name: WFBE_NEURODEF_AIRCRAFT_WALLS_V4
notes: AIRCRAFT FACTORY WALLS V4 (flag WFBE_C_WALLS_V4, default 0; V3 stays live default). FULL array: exact legacy 10x Land_HBarrier_large U-ring (verbatim, same footprint as the Light factory ring) + redesigned Concrete_Wall_EP1 slab layer OUTSIDE the ring at the HQ 2.2 m overlap pitch. HARD CONSTRAINT: aircraft exit +X onto the apron (Client_BuildUnit.sqf) - the +X face carries ZERO slabs. Fixes the V3 offenders explicitly: the lone single panels at [-3.6,15] and [-3.6,-15] are replaced by contiguous mirrored pairs flanking the front/rear centre walking gaps (|x|<2.5 kept open, slab inner edge x=3.6). The -X backing layer is split into a lower pair + upper 3-run so the legacy -X walking gap (y -4.5 to 1.5) stays passable through the slab layer. Land_CncBlock_Stripes accents at the front and -X gap mouths. No lone singles; front/rear offsets mirrored.

objs.role: LEGACY - +X apron edge south (egress side, kept as-is)
V4 slab - -X lower pair (south of walking gap)
V4 slab - -X upper run (north of walking gap)
V4 slab - front-left pair outer (replaces V3 lone single at [-3.6,15])
V4 slab - front-left pair inner (gap edge x=-3.6)
V4 slab - front-right pair inner (gap edge x=3.6)
V4 slab - rear-left pair outer (replaces V3 lone single at [-3.6,-15])
V4 accent - front gap mouth left
V4 accent - front gap mouth right
